heading: Issuance and guarantee of trust certificates
label: 2009cc–5 Issuance and guarantee of trust certificates

children.heading: Issuance
children.label: a Issuance
children.text: The Secretary may issue trust certificates representing ownership of all or a fractional part of debentures issued by a rural business investment company and guaranteed by the Secretary under this subchapter, if the certificates are based on and backed by a trust or pool approved by the Secretary and composed solely of guaranteed debentures.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary may, under such terms and conditions as the Secretary considers appropriate, guarantee the timely payment of the principal of and interest on trust certificates issued by the Secretary or agents of the Secretary for purposes of this section.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: Each guarantee under this subsection shall be limited to the extent of principal and interest on the guaranteed debentures that compose the trust or pool.

children.heading: Authority to prepay
children.label: i Authority to prepay
children.text: A debenture may be prepaid at any time without penalty.

children.heading: Reduction of guarantee
children.label: ii Reduction of guarantee
children.text: Subject to clause (i), if a debenture in a trust or pool is prepaid, or in the event of default of such a debenture, the guarantee of timely payment of principal and interest on the trust certificates shall be reduced in proportion to the amount of principal and interest the prepaid debenture represents in the trust or pool.

children.heading: Interest
children.label: B Interest
children.text: Interest on prepaid or defaulted debentures shall accrue and be guaranteed by the Secretary only through the date of payment of the guarantee.

children.heading: Redemption
children.label: C Redemption
children.text: At any time during its term, a trust certificate may be called for redemption due to prepayment or default of all debentures.

children.heading: Full faith and credit of the United States
children.label: c Full faith and credit of the United States
children.text: shall apply to any guarantee of a trust certificate issued by the Secretary under this section.Section 2009g(i) of this title

children.heading: Subrogation
children.label: 1 Subrogation
children.text: If the Secretary pays a claim under a guarantee issued under this section, the claim shall be subrogated fully to the rights satisfied by the payment.

children.heading: Ownership rights
children.label: 2 Ownership rights
children.text: No Federal, State, or local law shall preclude or limit the exercise by the Secretary of the ownership rights of the Secretary in a debenture residing in a trust or pool against which 1 or more trust certificates are issued under this section.

children.heading: Registration
children.label: 1 Registration
children.text: The Secretary shall provide for a central registration of all trust certificates issued under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: maintain such commercial bank accounts or investments in obligations of the United States as may be necessary to facilitate the creation of trusts or pools backed by debentures guaranteed under this subchapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: issue trust certificates to facilitate the creation of those trusts or pools.

children.heading: Fidelity bond or insurance requirement
children.label: 3 Fidelity bond or insurance requirement
children.text: Any agent performing functions on behalf of the Secretary under this paragraph shall provide a fidelity bond or insurance in such amount as the Secretary considers to be necessary to fully protect the interests of the United States.

children.heading: Regulation of brokers and dealers
children.label: 4 Regulation of brokers and dealers
children.text: The Secretary may regulate brokers and dealers in trust certificates issued under this section.

children.heading: Electronic registration
children.label: 5 Electronic registration
children.text: Nothing in this subsection prohibits the use of a book-entry or other electronic form of registration for trust certificates issued under this section.
